nodes.title: PD signoff manifest must enumerate all required closure evidence
Multi-corner STA evidence must exist before timing-closure promotion
CTS evidence must exist before clock-tree closure promotion
DFT/scan evidence must exist before testability promotion
Macro-placement evidence must exist before floorplan promotion
Die-area budget must be bounded before area/cost promotion
Commercial-EDA partnership gate stays BLOCKED until vendor access lands
CPU subsystem must integrate a production RV64 core, not the tiny contract stub
CPU privileged boot path (CLINT/PLIC/MMU/console) must close before OS bring-up claims
Full SoC routing/ordering/arbitration must close beyond the contract windows
DMA must be verified against a production memory hierarchy, not a 4 KiB SRAM aperture
NPU must replace bounded scratch GEMM with the selected production accelerator
Display must replace SRAM-backed scanout with a production framebuffer client
Boot ROM must replace identity contract words with executable reset/handoff code
DRAM model must be replaced with a real controller boundary and capacity discovery
CPU 2028 target selects mainline RV64GC Android-capable AP profile
Memory 2028 target defines UMA capacity and LPDDR bandwidth envelope
NPU 2028 target sets accelerator throughput and op-set envelope
NPU runtime contract pins descriptor ABI and MMIO map
Security 2028 target defines secure-boot and isolation contract
Process 14A effects spec bounds advanced-node assumptions
Clock/reset-domain intent captures top-level CDC/RDC assumptions
AXI4 interconnect MMIO map defines software-visible device windows
Platform contract pins SoC software-visible platform surface
AXI-Lite formal property pack must be bound across all fabric masters/targets
DMA formal coverage must extend to protocol and long-transfer invariants
NPU coverage accounting must publish opcode/shape/status/fallback summaries
Yosys structural fallback must not satisfy deep formal signoff gates
